---
title: "LRP58: Mechanism model — letter-sound knowledge (L) -> word reading (W)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

::: {.callout-warning title="Warning: Preliminary model output"}

This model output is preliminary and likely to change as the model evolves and further data are received.

:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
import json
from pathlib import Path

import arviz as az
import pandas as pd

_here = Path(".")
with open(_here / "config.json") as f:
    config = json.load(f)
trace = az.from_netcdf(_here / "trace.nc")
```

## Overview

LRP58 targets the causal effect $f^L$ of letter-sound knowledge on word reading,
using all three phase transitions.

## Adjustment set

- $G$ — linear confounder (one coefficient $\beta_G$).
- $A$ — standard confounder; the age-GP flag is **off by default**
  (see `notes/202604181700-lrp55-age-gp-drop.md`). Re-enable via
  `ModelSpec.extra={"use_age_gp": True}` for sensitivity.
- $E$ — confounds $L$ and $W$ ($E \to L$ and $E \to W$). Condition on.
- $R$ — confounds $L$ through $E$ ($R \to E \to L$) and affects $W$. Condition on.
- $W_{\text{pre}}$ — baseline word reading.

::: {.callout-important title="DAG decision: B is NOT in the adjustment set"}

Phoneme blending $B$ is a descendant of $L$ in the literacy-development cascade
($L \to \cdots \to B$) and should **not** be conditioned on: doing so would
introduce collider bias and attenuate $f^L$. The same argument excludes $F$ (CELF)
and $P$ (phonetic spelling) from the adjustment set.

This is the single most sensitive modelling decision in the mechanism-model
set. If a reviewer believes $B$ is an independent cause of $W$ not mediated
through $L$, they should fit the alternative (conditioning on $B$) and
compare $f^L$ estimates.

:::

### Identification caveats

- NUCA for $(L_{\text{post}}, W_{\text{post}})$ — not testable.
- Measurement error in $L_{\text{post}}$ attenuates $f^L$.

![Model diagram](model_graph.svg){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

## Shared priors

![alpha](prior_alpha.svg){width=40%}
![tau](prior_tau.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_own](prior_gamma_own.svg){width=40%}
![gamma_cross](prior_gamma_cross.svg){width=40%}
![kappa](prior_kappa.svg){width=40%}

## Sampling diagnostics

```{python}
# | echo: false
diag = pd.read_csv(_here / "diagnostics.csv", index_col=0)
diag
```

![Trace](trace_plot.png){.lightbox}
![Energy](energy_plot.png){.lightbox}

## Mechanism curve

![Mechanism curve](mechanism_curve.png){.lightbox}

```{python}
# | echo: false
mech = pd.read_csv(_here / "mechanism_curve.csv")
mech.head(15)
```

## Posterior predictive

![Posterior predictive check](posterior_predictive_check.png){.lightbox}

## LOO-PSIS

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
print("```\n" + open(_here / "loo.txt").read() + "\n```")
```

## Configuration

```{python}
# | echo: false
config
```
